api_key.description: ActiveCampaign API key, sent as the Api-Token request header. Never logged.

base_url.description: ActiveCampaign API base URL, e.g. https://<account>.api-us1.com/api/3. Required; the engine has no mechanism to derive this from an account subdomain the way legacy did (see docs.md's Known limits).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
